courseTitle: Track Studio I: Methods and Media
title: Archive, Ritual, or Dataset Game
genericDescription: Transform source material into rules; distinguish representation from interaction; cite sources or influences responsibly.
specificDescription: Storytelling and Digital Humanities students adapt an archive item, historical episode, or literary fragment. Metamodern Interactive Art students create a ritualized interaction from a personal or cultural gesture. Gaming for the AI Age students use a small dataset or generated corpus as design material. The result must be playable without reading the source first.
gradingRubric: 30 pts source-to-system transformation; 20 pts track relevance; 20 pts playability; 15 pts citation/context; 15 pts reflection.
